properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This is a realm of Your glory This is a realm of Your grace I can feel Your mighty power Oh, it's moving in this place

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We're in the presence of angels With God's glory on their wings Like the voice of many waters I can hear the angels sing

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Singing, "Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy"

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This is a realm of Your glory This is a realm of Your grace I can feel Your mighty power Yeah, it's moving in this place

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are worthy Worthy Worthy Worthy

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Show us Your glory Glory Glory Glory

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Show us Your (glory) Glory Glory Glory
